title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CABUGAO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE CITY OF ROXAS TO ANATOLIA A. ARCENAS MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1548 / 57 OG No. 4, 625 (January 23, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2742, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CABUGAO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE CITY OF ROXAS TO ANATOLIA A. ARCENAS MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Cabugao Elementary School located at Barrio Cabugao, Loctugan, City of Roxas, is changed to Anatolia A. Arcenas Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
